title: pleres #4134
definition:
1) full, i.e. filled up (as opposed to empty)
    1a) of hollow vessels
    1b) of a surface, covered in every part
    1c) of the soul, thoroughly permeated with
 2) full, i.e. complete
    2a) lacking nothing, perfect
